task_completion.description: Navigate to the attendance management or regularization module in the HRMS software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HRMS application is open and the attendance, manual entry, or regularization screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Search for or select the employee Anita Desai (EMP-2055).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Anita Desai' or ID 'EMP-2055' is typed into a search bar or selected from an employee list.

task_completion.description: Select the dates February 10, 2025, to February 12, 2025.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dates Feb 10, Feb 11, and Feb 12, 2025, are selected or entered in the date range fields.

task_completion.description: Change the attendance status for the selected dates to 'On Duty'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or status field is set to 'On Duty' (or 'OD') for the specified dates.
The text 'Client Site Implementation' is typed into a remarks, notes, or reason field.

task_completion.description: Save or apply the attendance regularization changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save', 'Apply', or 'Submit' button is clicked, or a success confirmation message is displayed.

integrity.description: The agent used the HRMS graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the AttendHRM application windows, not terminal commands or database editors.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the task details into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual HRMS application fields, not Notepad or a similar text editor.

integrity.description: The results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application screens look like a real HRMS interface with appropriate menus, buttons, and layouts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target dates: February 10, 11, and 12, 2025. Target status: 'On Duty' (or 'OD'). Target remark: 'Client Site Implementation' (must contain 'client'). Note: The employee Anita Desai (EMP-2055) might not exist in the system, which could prevent the agent from completing the task.
